next_step.name: standard_injected_peak_table
next_step.next_action_if_missing: Wait for the active chunked build to merge and self-verify.
next_step.note: Merged 20k injected BLS peak table exists and passed strict schema verification.

steps.name: standard_injected_peak_table
steps.next_action_if_missing: Wait for the active chunked build to merge and self-verify.
steps.note: Merged 20k injected BLS peak table exists and passed strict schema verification.

steps.name: post_bls_peak_gate
steps.next_action_if_missing: Run summarize_injection_peak_gate.py on the verified peak table.

steps.name: failure_mode_audit
steps.next_action_if_missing: Run audit_injection_bls_failure_modes.py before changing BLS branches.
steps.note: Failure-mode audit separates ranker-fixable and search-miss injections.

steps.name: injected_truth_peak_ranker
steps.next_action_if_missing: Run run_s56_peak_ranker_review_pdo.sh or ORCD ranker Slurm wrapper.
steps.note: Injected-truth peak ranker trained after peak-table verification.

steps.name: real_bls_peak_table_verified
steps.next_action_if_missing: Run verify_real_bls_peak_table.py on the staged real candidate table.
steps.note: Real S56 multi-peak BLS table passed verifier before ranker application.

steps.name: ranker_selected_real_ephemerides
steps.next_action_if_missing: Run apply_injection_peak_ranker.py on the real S56 BLS table.
steps.note: Peak ranker has selected real-candidate ephemerides.

steps.name: skip_leo_review_queue_verified
steps.next_action_if_missing: Build and verify a skip-LEO queue before expensive LEO rendering.
steps.note: Ranker-selected real queue exists and passed pre-LEO verifier.

steps.name: leo_review_queue_verified
steps.next_action_if_missing: Run run_s56_ranker_selected_real_leo_pdo.sh after the skip-LEO queue passes.
steps.note: Ranker-selected real queue has LEO reports and passed verifier.
